Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF O'GRADY PAVING, INC.'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Because no defendant has yet appeared, there is good cause to grant the motion. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
